# Pull Request

## What does this change?

[Brief description of the change.]

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to an existing skill
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example / evidence
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Public-facing canonical files are in English, or are explicit localized mirrors such as `README.pt-BR.md`.
- [ ] Protocol/skill artifacts are inert (no shell commands, no network calls, no credential handling).
- [ ] Any runnable example with external URLs is opt-in, version-pinned, integrity-protected, and documented.
- [ ] Any new skill includes: Name, Purpose, When to use, Procedure, Output contract, Failure modes, Example invocation.
- [ ] No invented metrics, testimonials, benchmarks, or screenshots.
- [ ] Where proof is missing, an explicit `<!-- TODO: attach real screenshot / measured result -->` placeholder is used.
- [ ] Strong claims are backed by an example, checklist, or limitation.

## Related issues

[Link any related issues.]
